name: Avgolemono
recipeInstructions:
1. Make chicken broth and heat to boiling; add rice. Simmer covered for about 20 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. In a bowl, beat egg whites until stiff. Add yolks and beat well. Beat continuously, adding lemon juice a little at a time.
3. Gradually add about 1/5 of the broth to the beaten mixture, beating continuously.
4. Pour this mixture back into the pot with the broth and rice. Mix well over heat but do not allow the soup to come to a boil.
5. Serve immediately.
